meaning: 布里斯班[澳大利亚东部港市](昆士兰州首府)
examples: Brisbane has become the boom town for Australian film and television.
The price includes two economy class airfares from Brisbane to Los Angeles.
In spite of having a new radiator fitted in Brisbane, the car began overheating, then conked out completely.
Meanwhile Shane Watson has spoken of his determination to help the Brisbane flood victims.
Wales meet the Wallabies in Sydney on 26 May and again on 2 June in Brisbane.
